title: Item Duplicates not allowed
excerpt: “Is it possible to set a condition on board items to prevent duplicates?”

posts.author: Buca (Rodrigo Bucarey)
posts.cookedHtml: “Is it possible to set a condition on board items to prevent duplicates?”

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Buca,
You can use the Duplicates and Uniques app to ensure that, any duplicates in your board is automatically deleted.
Here is demo of how that works

posts.author: Buca (Rodrigo Bucarey)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @kolaai i will try it. It seems it woks very good. Thank you very much

posts.author: TiredUser (Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is a topic that has been persistent for several years.
We are likely not a big user of the Moday program in the big picture but i can assure you we are already tired of the business model.
“here is the base program. oh you want actual functionality? well add this app to do one thing then add this app to do another. there are hundreds of apps that do all the things you need. +++++++++++”
The program comes with very limited functionality the only positive is that i can share data in real time with the entire company otherwise Excel can do far, far more and much more efficiently.
the standard refrain is “As mentioned earlier in this thread, this is not something we internally support at this time.” seems as though what they are saying is we aren’t going to help you with this ever, buy an app.
This seems as though it would be a universally used idea. No body wants duplicate items if they are tracking items like serial numbers. Adding functionality instead of driving people to “APPS” would be far more useful and helpful to users.

posts.author: TiredUser (Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
the underlying issue is not that the functionality can be added if you want it. The problem is that we are continually asked to fork out more money. More money to add limited functionality. more money to do simple things that as far as i can tell, previously existed in the base program.
This is a financial burden being added for no other reason than to take more and more of companies revenues under the guise of helping them. The duplicates not allowed function previously existed as part of the base program.
